ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "birthplace" TEXT /* Birthplace of the individual */,
  "father_birthplace" TEXT /* Birthplace of the individual's father */,
  "mother_birthplace" TEXT /* Birthplace of the individual's mother */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "health_insurance_status" TEXT /* Health insurance status of the individual */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each familial relationship */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "related_individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related individual */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of familial relationship (e.g., Head, Wife, Daughter) */,
  "date_of_relationship" TEXT /* Date of relationship establishment */,
  "degree_of_relationship" TEXT /* Degree of relationship (e.g., first cousin, second cousin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_related_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "date_of_marriage" TEXT /* Date of marriage */,
  "date_of_divorce" TEXT /* Date of divorce (if applicable) */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marital_status_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the occupation */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the occupation */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the occupation */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the occupation (full-time, part-time, unemployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the demographic report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., age distribution, marital status) */,
  "report_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the report (e.g., age distribution by region) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
